nasb.text: Solomon did what was evil in the sight of the Lord, and did not follow the Lord fully, as David his father had done.

esv.text: So Solomon did what was evil in the sight of the Lord and did not wholly follow the Lord, as David his father had done.

cnv.text: 所羅門行耶和華看為惡的事，不效法他的父親大衛完完全全跟從耶和華。

ccb.text: 他做了耶和华视为恶的事，没有像他父亲大卫那样忠心顺服耶和华。
